channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New lawsuit alleges U.S. shared asylum application details with Iran
item.description: A lawsuit alleges the Trump administration is divulging details of Iranian asylum seekers to the government of Iran.

item.title: There's no treatment designed for the Ebola strain ravaging DRC. But now there's hope
item.description: The strain of the virus that's responsible for the current outbreak has no specific treatments or preventive measures. Three new clinical trials could...

item.title: International Olympic Committee lifts Russia suspension ahead of 2028 LA Games
item.description: The International Olympic Committee advised sports bodies to end a three-year program vetting Russians for neutral status ahead of qualifying events f...

item.title: Defending champion Argentina stages dramatic World Cup comeback against Egypt
item.description: Egypt led 2-0 late in the match, but Argentina rallied with two goals to equalize and secure a remarkable result.
